fields.name: pdaBump
docs: The PDA bump.

fields.name: funder
docs: The funder.

fields.name: launch
docs: The launch.

fields.name: committedAmount
docs: The amount of USDC that has been committed by the funder.

fields.name: isTokensClaimed
docs: Whether the tokens have been claimed.

fields.name: isUsdcRefunded
docs: Whether the USDC has been refunded.

fields.name: approvedAmount
docs: The amount of USDC that the launch authority has approved for the funder.
If zero, the funder has not been approved for any amount.

fields.name: committedAmountAccumulator
docs: Running integral of committed_amount over time (committed_amount * seconds).

fields.name: lastAccumulatorUpdate
docs: Unix timestamp of the last accumulator update.

fields.name: pdaBump
docs: The PDA bump.

fields.name: funder
docs: The funder.

fields.name: launch
docs: The launch.

fields.name: committedAmount
docs: The amount of USDC that has been committed by the funder.

fields.name: isTokensClaimed
docs: Whether the tokens have been claimed.

fields.name: isUsdcRefunded
docs: Whether the USDC has been refunded.

fields.name: approvedAmount
docs: The amount of USDC that the launch authority has approved for the funder.
If zero, the funder has not been approved for any amount.

fields.name: pdaBump
docs: The PDA bump.

fields.name: minimumRaiseAmount
docs: The minimum amount of USDC that must be raised, otherwise
everyone can get their USDC back.

fields.name: monthlySpendingLimitAmount
docs: The monthly spending limit the DAO allocates to the team. Must be
less than 1/6th of the minimum raise amount (so 6 months of burn).

fields.name: monthlySpendingLimitMembers
docs: The wallets that have access to the monthly spending limit.

fields.name: launchAuthority
docs: The account that can start the launch.

fields.name: launchSigner
docs: The launch signer address. Needed because Raydium pools need a SOL payer and this PDA can't hold SOL.

fields.name: launchSignerPdaBump
docs: The PDA bump for the launch signer.

fields.name: launchQuoteVault
docs: The USDC vault that will hold the USDC raised until the launch is over.

fields.name: launchBaseVault
docs: The token vault, used to send tokens to Raydium.

fields.name: baseMint
docs: The token that will be minted to funders and that will control the DAO.

fields.name: quoteMint
docs: The USDC mint.

fields.name: unixTimestampStarted
docs: The unix timestamp when the launch was started.

fields.name: unixTimestampClosed
docs: The unix timestamp when the launch stopped taking new contributions.

fields.name: totalCommittedAmount
docs: The amount of USDC that has been committed by the users.

fields.name: state
docs: The state of the launch.

fields.name: seqNum
docs: The sequence number of this launch. Useful for sorting events.

fields.name: secondsForLaunch
docs: The number of seconds that the launch will be live for.

fields.name: dao
docs: The DAO, if the launch is complete.

fields.name: daoVault
docs: The DAO treasury that USDC / LP is sent to, if the launch is complete.

fields.name: performancePackageGrantee
docs: The address that will receive the performance package tokens.

fields.name: performancePackageTokenAmount
docs: The amount of tokens to be granted to the performance package grantee.

fields.name: monthsUntilInsidersCanUnlock
docs: The number of months that insiders must wait before unlocking their tokens.

fields.name: teamAddress
docs: The initial address used to sponsor team proposals.

fields.name: totalApprovedAmount
docs: The amount of USDC that the launch authority has approved across all funders.

fields.name: additionalTokensAmount
docs: The amount of additional tokens to be minted on a successful launch.

fields.name: additionalTokensRecipient
docs: The token account that will receive the additional tokens.

fields.name: additionalTokensClaimed
docs: Are the additional tokens claimed

fields.name: unixTimestampCompleted
docs: The unix timestamp when the launch was completed.

fields.name: isPerformancePackageInitialized
docs: Whether the performance package has been initialized.

fields.name: accumulatorActivationDelaySeconds
docs: Number of seconds after launch start before the funding accumulator
begins tracking.

fields.name: hasBidWall
docs: Whether the launch has a bid wall.

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount

errors.name: SupplyNonZero
errors.msg: Supply must be zero

errors.name: InvalidSecondsForLaunch
errors.msg: Launch period must be between 1 hour and 2 weeks

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: Insufficient funds

errors.name: InvalidTokenKey
errors.msg: Token mint key must end in 'meta'

errors.name: InvalidLaunchState
errors.msg: Invalid launch state

errors.name: LaunchPeriodNotOver
errors.msg: Launch period not over

errors.name: LaunchExpired
errors.msg: Launch is complete, no more funding allowed

errors.name: LaunchNotRefunding
errors.msg: For you to get a refund, either the launch needs to be in a refunding state or the launch must have been over-committed

errors.name: LaunchNotInitialized
errors.msg: Launch must be initialized to be started

errors.name: FreezeAuthoritySet
errors.msg: Freeze authority can't be set on launchpad tokens

errors.name: InvalidMonthlySpendingLimit
errors.msg: Monthly spending limit must be less than 1/6th of the minimum raise amount and cannot be 0

errors.name: InvalidMonthlySpendingLimitMembers
errors.msg: There can only be at most 10 monthly spending limit members

errors.name: InvalidPriceBasedPremineAmount
errors.msg: Cannot do more than a 50% premine, minimum is 10 atoms of token

errors.name: InvalidPerformancePackageMinUnlockTime
errors.msg: Insiders must be forced to wait at least 18 months before unlocking their tokens

errors.name: LaunchAuthorityNotSet
errors.msg: Launch authority must be set to complete the launch until 2 days after closing

errors.name: FinalRaiseAmountTooLow
errors.msg: The final amount raised must be greater than or equal to the minimum raise amount

errors.name: TokensAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Tokens already claimed

errors.name: MoneyAlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Money already refunded

errors.name: InvariantViolated
errors.msg: An invariant was violated. You should get in contact with the MetaDAO team if you see this

errors.name: LaunchNotLive
errors.msg: Launch must be live to be closed

errors.name: InvalidMinimumRaiseAmount
errors.msg: Minimum raise amount must be greater than or equal to $0.5 so that there's enough liquidity for the launch

errors.name: FinalRaiseAmountAlreadySet
errors.msg: The final raise amount has already been set

errors.name: TotalApprovedAmountTooLow
errors.msg: Total approved amount must be greater than or equal to the minimum raise amount

errors.name: InvalidAdditionalTokensRecipient
errors.msg: Invalid additional tokens recipient - should be set if additional tokens amount is greater than 0

errors.name: NoAdditionalTokensRecipientSet
errors.msg: No additional tokens recipient set

errors.name: AdditionalTokensAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Additional tokens already claimed

errors.name: FundingRecordApprovalPeriodOver
errors.msg: Funding record approval period is over

errors.name: PerformancePackageAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Performance package already initialized

errors.name: InvalidDao
errors.msg: Invalid DAO

errors.name: InvalidAccumulatorActivationDelaySeconds
errors.msg: Accumulator activation delay must be less than the launch duration

errors.name: ExtendDurationExceedsMax
errors.msg: The extend duration would exceed the maximum allowed launch duration
